description: Style NoteAccesorise your outfit with fabulous costume jewellery from adrika. It will grab attention with its subtle beauty and exquisite designs. Wear it for that special day and get the mood just right with this piece!Product DetailsPink and green beaded 1strand necklace that is attached with a string and has metal embellishments with a lobster claspMaterial and CareGlass and plastic  beads with metallic embellishmentsWipe with soft cloth to maintain shine and keep away dust and dirtSizeLength of chain: 21 cm
